tasks.title: Start and supply the Product
tasks.prompt: Start a new PaintNode project in this empty folder. Bring this supplied Product image into the project, then start a Campaign Composer workflow for a multi-format launch. Use only the Product; you do not have Subject or Style references for this job.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop when the Product is assigned to an open Campaign Composer, or when blocked.

tasks.title: Create real alternatives
tasks.prompt: Create three different campaign directions using PaintNode's normal generation flow. Compare what completed. If a real provider or app failure occurs, keep the useful alternatives and try to recover only the incomplete work using visible public-user controls.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop when three real directions are available for comparison, or when a real visible error prevents progress.

tasks.title: Compare and choose a direction
tasks.prompt: Compare the available directions, inspect enough context to make a choice, and accept the direction you prefer for downstream work. Stop after the direction is accepted.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop when one direction is visibly accepted for downstream work, or when blocked.

tasks.title: Refine in the editor
tasks.prompt: Make a small visible edit to the direction you chose, then return that edit to the campaign so future formats use the edited version.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop after the specified edit is returned, or when blocked.
tasks.creatorFacingAddendum: For the small visible edit, rename the active workflow-result layer to Virtual Accepted Direction and set its opacity to 96 percent.

tasks.title: Produce the output family
tasks.prompt: Finish the campaign as square, portrait, and landscape outputs based on your accepted edited direction. Use the normal generation flow and check that you received all three formats.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop when all three real format results are inspected, or when blocked by a visible provider or app error.

tasks.title: Understand reuse and an upstream change
tasks.prompt: First run the campaign again without changing anything and inspect what PaintNode reuses. Then replace the Product with this updated version and bring the campaign up to date while keeping work that does not need to change.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop after unchanged reuse and the real selective update after Product replacement have both been inspected, or when blocked.

tasks.title: Revise one output without losing the others
tasks.prompt: Revise or regenerate only the Landscape output using the normal public-user controls. Keep the completed Square and Portrait outputs unchanged. If a real provider or app failure occurs, recover only the affected work if the UI allows it.
tasks.stopCondition: Stop when Landscape has a new real result and Square and Portrait remain intact, or when a real visible error prevents progress.

tasks.title: Resume after restart and use a result
tasks.prompt: Save your work and quit PaintNode. Wait while the operator restarts the same repo-built app. After APP RESUMED, reopen the same project and campaign, confirm you can understand where you left off, then place the edited campaign result into an image document.
tasks.stopCondition: Pause after PaintNode quits; after APP RESUMED, stop when saved state is verified and the edited result is placed as a document layer, or when blocked.
